name: ExtensionArtifactAssessment_Disposition
title: R5: unresolved | not-persuasive | persuasive | persuasive-with-modification | not-persuasive-with-modification (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ArtifactAssessment.disposition` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ArtifactAssessment.disposition` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `ArtifactAssessment.disposition` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.disposition` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.disposition` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: unresolved | not-persuasive | persuasive | persuasive-with-modification | not-persuasive-with-modification (new)

element.definition: Indicates the disposition of the responsible party to the comment or change request.
